name: a classified in-scope namespace is revealed as activated true with the workload type that put it in scope
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "an AI credentialing platform" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); fs=d["full_surface"]; e=fs.find{|x|x["namespace"]=="security-governance"}; exit(e && e["activated"]==true && !e["via"].nil? ? 0:1)' && echo activated-has-via 1>&2
